calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Jak Marquez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Abduollh Dos was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Rachael Taylor.
Exhibit-1 Three-day Notice-----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Past-due Rent $413.00
Holdover Damages $605.44
Costs $285.00, for a total of $1,303.44
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated to the return of the exhibit in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Continued To Nov-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CURTIS DOWLING, ATTORNEY FOR THE PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT, WHO IS PRESENT.

NO APPEARNCE BY THE DEFENDANT RACHAEL TAYLOR. CASE IS OFF CALENDAR. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN, CLERK S.VANTREE, NOT REPORTED.(218)
